ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'DesignAndProposal', INCLUDES(PerformanceFeeMethod__c, 'Hurdle'), OR(ISBLANK(HurdleRate__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(HurdleType__c))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If PerformanceFeeMethod contains 'Hurdle', please provide values for the Hurdle Type and the Hurdle Rate.
